🌿 The Shire Garden 🌿

Weed the garden plots, plant your banner, dig for buried treasure — and earn real gold!

🌱 Servant Gardeners

Tap the sigil to change it, tap the circle to change banner colors.
The map, claims, treasure, and piggy banks all save on this device automatically.

🌿 The Shire Garden

THE SHIRE GARDEN  · v19

🛡️ This Week's Conquest

Weed a bed in real life, then tap its province to plant your flag! The Weed Monster inspects every province — do it well and a gold castle seals your gold. 🏰 Somewhere out there, treasure is buried…

🐷 Gold Owed

💵

Pay Day!

Time to settle up — gold owed since the last Pay Day:

Pay Day is every Sunday at 5pm. The 📱 button sends the final totals & scores to the Weed Monster.
🔄

Reset the Shire?

This clears every flag from the map, buries fresh treasure, and sets everyone's gold totals (owed and lifetime) back to $0. The Hall of Rulers history is kept.
